allow: PowerShell($paths = @\("C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\node.exe", "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\nodejs\\node.exe", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\nodejs\\node.exe", "$env:APPDATA\\npm\\node.exe", "$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $p" } else { Write-Output "NOT: $p" } }; Write-Output "---"; Write-Output "PATH entries with 'node':"; $env:PATH -split ';' | Where-Object { $_ -match 'node' })

PowerShell($tools = @\("nvm", "fnm", "volta", "winget", "choco"\); foreach \($t in $tools\) { $cmd = Get-Command $t -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($cmd\) { Write-Output "AVAILABLE: $t -> $\($cmd.Source\)" } })

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== 4. Current directory ==="; \(Get-Location\).Path; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "=== 5. Files exist ==="; Write-Output \("railos-assets.zip -> " + \(Test-Path "railos-assets.zip"\)\); Write-Output \("railos-icons.zip  -> " + \(Test-Path "railos-icons.zip"\)\); Write-Output ""; Write-Output "=== Full directory listing ==="; Get-ChildItem -Force | Select-Object Mode, Length, Name | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== svg folder count ==="; \(Get-ChildItem railos-icons/svg -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Count; Write-Output "=== png-black count ==="; \(Get-ChildItem railos-icons/png-black -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Count; Write-Output "=== png-white count ==="; \(Get-ChildItem railos-icons/png-white -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Count; Write-Output "=== svg first 5 ==="; Get-ChildItem railos-icons/svg -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 5 | Format-Table Name -AutoSize | Out-String)

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== railos-icons deep tree ==="; Get-ChildItem railos-icons -Recurse -Force | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName.Replace\(\(Get-Location\).Path, ""\) } | Select-Object -First 30; Write-Output "---"; Write-Output "=== Total files ==="; \(Get-ChildItem railos-icons -Recurse -File\).Count)
PowerShell(Write-Output "=== railos-assets deep tree ==="; Get-ChildItem railos-assets -Recurse -Force | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName.Replace\(\(Get-Location\).Path, ""\) })

PowerShell(Write-Output "icons-ui count: $\(\(Get-ChildItem temp-assets\\public\\icons-ui\).Count\)"; Write-Output "icon.png exists: $\(Test-Path temp-assets\\public\\icon.png\)"; Write-Output "logo.png exists: $\(Test-Path temp-assets\\public\\logo.png\)"; Write-Output "Icon.tsx exists: $\(Test-Path temp-assets\\components\\ui\\Icon.tsx\)")

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== node location ==="; Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Source; Write-Output "=== npm location ==="; Get-Command npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Source; Write-Output "=== npx location ==="; Get-Command npx -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Source; Write-Output "=== PATH nodejs ==="; \($env:PATH -split ';'\) | Where-Object { $_ -match 'node|npm' })

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== Testing common Node paths ==="; $paths = @\("C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\node.exe", "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\nodejs\\node.exe", "$env:APPDATA\\npm", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\nodejs\\node.exe", "$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs\\npm.cmd", "$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs\\npx.cmd"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { Write-Output "$p : $\(Test-Path $p\)" })

PowerShell(Remove-Item temp-assets -Recurse -Force; Write-Output "temp-assets exists: $\(Test-Path temp-assets\)"; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "=== Root contents ==="; Get-ChildItem -Force | Format-Table Name, Mode -AutoSize | Out-String)

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== manifest.json exists: $\(Test-Path public\\manifest.json\) ==="; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "=== manifest.json content ==="; Get-Content public\\manifest.json -Raw; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "=== Final public/ contents ==="; Get-ChildItem public | Format-Table Name, Mode, Length -AutoSize | Out-String)

PowerShell(Copy-Item .env.example .env.local; Write-Output "=== .env.example exists: $\(Test-Path .env.example\) ==="; Write-Output "=== .env.local exists: $\(Test-Path .env.local\) ==="; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "=== .env.example content ==="; Get-Content .env.example)
Bash(awk '{ if \(length\($0\) > 40\) print substr\($0, 1, 40\) "..."; else print $0 }' .env.local)
